name: 道の駅 吉野ヶ里
desc: 国道385号沿い、脊振山系の麓に位置する道の駅。物産館「さざんか千坊館」では天然水を使った焼きたてパンが人気。吉野ヶ里歴史公園にも近い。
descEn: Located along Route 385 at the foot of the Sefuri mountain range. The Sazanka Senbokan market is known for fresh-baked bread made with natural spring water, and it's close to Yoshinogari Historical Park.
